SELECT YY.STS, YY.SO_NO, YY.CON_PRICE_YN, YY.PO_NO, YY.PJT_NO, YY.T_ITEM_CD, YY.UNIT_NO, YY.UNIT_NM,
       YY.ITEM_CD, YY.ITEM_NM,  YY.REV, YY.SPEC, YY.PO_UNIT_QTY, YY.PO_PRICE, YY.PO_AMT,
       YY.MONEY_UNIT, YY.CUST_CD, YY.CUST_NAME, YY.PO_DT, YY.PO_PLAN_NO, YY.ITEM_KIND, YY.PJT_NAME,
       YY.PO_PLAN_DT, YY.DVRY_DT, YY.DVRY_DT2, YY.PO_PLAN_KIND, YY.EMP_NM, YY.QC_KIND,
       YY.FOR_PRICE, YY.FOR_AMT, YY.REL_NO, YY.PO_PRSN, YY.PO_UNIT, YY.RMK, YY.ABNL_QTY, Z.CODE_NAME AS ITEM_KIND_NM
  FROM (
       SELECT (SELECT CODE_NAME FROM ZAA010T WHERE MAJOR_CD = 'M001'AND MINOR_CD = A.STS) AS STS, A.SO_NO,
              B.CON_PRICE_YN, A.PO_NO, A.PJT_NO,
              A.T_ITEM_CD, A.P_ITEM_CD AS UNIT_NO,
              (SELECT ITEM_NM FROM BBA010T WHERE ITEM_CD = A.P_ITEM_CD) UNIT_NM,
              A.ITEM_CD , D.ITEM_NM, D.SPEC,
              A.PO_UNIT_QTY, A.PO_PRICE, A.PO_AMT,
              (SELECT CODE_NAME FROM ZAA010T WHERE MAJOR_CD = 'B004' AND MINOR_CD = A.MONEY_UNIT) AS MONEY_UNIT,
              B.CUST_CD,(SELECT CUST_NAME FROM BAA020T WHERE CUST_CD = B.CUST_CD) AS CUST_NAME,
              CASE WHEN ISDATE(B.PO_DT) = 1 THEN CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), CAST(B.PO_DT AS DATETIME), 120) ELSE '' END AS PO_DT,
              A.PO_PLAN_NO, D.ITEM_KIND,
              CASE WHEN ISDATE(C.PO_PLAN_DT) = 1 THEN CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), CAST(C.PO_PLAN_DT AS DATETIME), 120) ELSE '' END  AS PO_PLAN_DT,
              CASE WHEN ISDATE(A.DVRY_DT) = 1 THEN CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), CAST(A.DVRY_DT AS DATETIME), 120) ELSE '' END  AS DVRY_DT,
              CASE WHEN ISDATE(A.DVRY_DT2) = 1 THEN CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), CAST(A.DVRY_DT2 AS DATETIME), 120) ELSE '' END  AS DVRY_DT2,
              (SELECT CODE_NAME FROM ZAA010T WHERE MAJOR_CD = 'M014' AND MINOR_CD = A.PO_PLAN_KIND) AS PO_PLAN_KIND,
              (SELECT NAME FROM PHA999TV WHERE EMP_NO = C.EMP_NO) AS EMP_NM,
              A.FOR_PRICE, A.FOR_AMT, A.REL_NO, A.PO_PRSN, A.REV, E.PJT_NAME, A.PO_UNIT, A.RMK, X.ABNL_QTY ,A.QC_KIND
         FROM MCA210T A
        INNER JOIN MCA200T B
                ON A.PO_NO = B.PO_NO
        INNER JOIN BBA010T D
                ON A.ITEM_CD = D.ITEM_CD
         LEFT JOIN MBA200T C
                ON A.PO_PLAN_NO = C.PO_PLAN_NO
         INNER JOIN SCA200T E
                ON A.PJT_NO = E.PJT_NO
         LEFT JOIN BBA661T X
                ON A.PJT_NO = X.PJT_NO
               AND A.T_ITEM_CD = X.T_ITEM_CD
               AND A.P_ITEM_CD = X.P_ITEM_CD
               AND A.ITEM_CD = X.ITEM_CD
        WHERE A.STS IN ('50','55','60','70','80','90')
          AND B.PO_DT >= '20260310'
          AND B.PO_DT <= '20260410'
 UNION ALL
       SELECT '재고감안' AS STS, A.SO_NO,
              'Y' AS CON_PRICE_YN, '' AS PO_NO, A.PJT_NO,
              A.T_ITEM_CD, A.P_ITEM_CD AS UNIT_NO,
              (SELECT ITEM_NM FROM BBA010T WHERE ITEM_CD = A.P_ITEM_CD) UNIT_NM,
              A.ITEM_CD, D.ITEM_NM,  D.SPEC,
              A.ADV_QTY AS PO_UNIT_QTY, ISNULL(F.AVG_PRICE, 0) AS PO_PRICE,
              ISNULL((A.ADV_QTY * F.AVG_PRICE), 0) AS PO_AMT,
              'KRW' AS MONEY_UNIT,
              '' AS CUST_CD,'' AS CUST_NAME,
              CASE WHEN ISDATE(A.ADV_DT) = 1 THEN CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), CAST(A.ADV_DT AS DATETIME), 120) ELSE '' END AS PO_DT,
              A.REL_NO AS PO_PLAN_NO, D.ITEM_KIND,
              CASE WHEN ISDATE(G.PO_PLAN_DT) = 1 THEN CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), CAST(G.PO_PLAN_DT AS DATETIME), 120) ELSE '' END  AS PO_PLAN_DT,
              CASE WHEN ISDATE(H.DVRY_DT) = 1 THEN CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), CAST(H.DVRY_DT AS DATETIME), 120) ELSE '' END  AS DVRY_DT,
              '' AS DVRY_DT2,
              (SELECT CODE_NAME FROM ZAA010T WHERE MAJOR_CD = 'M014' AND MINOR_CD = H.PO_PLAN_KIND) AS PO_PLAN_KIND,
              (SELECT NAME FROM PHA999TV WHERE EMP_NO = G.EMP_NO) AS EMP_NM,
              0 AS FOR_PRICE, 0 AS FOR_AMT, '' AS REL_NO,
              H.PO_PRSN, H.REV, I.PJT_NAME, H.PO_UNIT, '' AS RMK, X.ABNL_QTY, D.QC_KIND
         FROM MAD111T A
        LEFT JOIN IBA200T F
                ON A.ITEM_CD = F.ITEM_CD
               AND A.WH_CD = F.WH_CD
               AND LEFT(A.ADV_DT,6) = F.BASE_YYYYMM
               AND <http://F.ORG|F.ORG>_PART = '1'
        INNER JOIN BBA010T D
                ON A.ITEM_CD = D.ITEM_CD
        INNER JOIN MBA200T G
                ON A.REL_NO = G.PO_PLAN_NO
        INNER JOIN MBA210T H
                ON A.REL_NO = H.PO_PLAN_NO
               AND A.REL_SEQ = H.PO_PLAN_SEQ
        INNER JOIN SCA200T I
                ON A.PJT_NO = I.PJT_NO
         LEFT JOIN BBA661T X
                ON A.PJT_NO = X.PJT_NO
               AND A.T_ITEM_CD = X.T_ITEM_CD
               AND A.P_ITEM_CD = X.P_ITEM_CD
               AND A.ITEM_CD = X.ITEM_CD
        WHERE  A.STS <> 'R'
          AND A.ADV_KIND = 'W'
          AND A.ADV_DT >= '20260310'
          AND A.ADV_DT <= '20260410'
       ) YY
   LEFT JOIN ZAA010T Z
     ON Z.MAJOR_CD =   'B051'
    AND Z.MINOR_CD =   YY.ITEM_KIND

 SELECT    YY.STS, YY.MONEY_KIND, YY.SFOR_AMT
   FROM    (
           SELECT  '발주금액' AS STS,(SELECT CODE_NAME FROM ZAA010T  WHERE MAJOR_CD = 'B004' AND MINOR_CD = A.MONEY_UNIT) AS MONEY_KIND,
                   CASE    A.MONEY_UNIT WHEN 'KRW' THEN SUM(A.PO_AMT)  ELSE  SUM(A.FOR_AMT) END SFOR_AMT
             FROM  MCA210T A INNER JOIN MCA200T B
                   ON      A.PO_NO     =   B.PO_NO
                   LEFT OUTER JOIN  BBA010T C
                   ON      A.ITEM_CD   =   C.ITEM_CD
            WHERE  A.MONEY_UNIT <> ''
              AND  A.STS IN ('50','55','60','70', '80','90')
              AND  B.PO_DT >= '20260310'
              AND  B.PO_DT <= '20260410'
           GROUP BY A.MONEY_UNIT
           UNION All
           SELECT  '재고감안' AS STS,
                   'KRW' AS MONEY_KIND,
                   SUM(ISNULL((A.ADV_QTY * F.AVG_PRICE), 0)) AS SFOR_AMT
             FROM  MAD111T A   LEFT JOIN IBA200T F
                   ON  A.ITEM_CD   =   F.ITEM_CD
                   AND A.WH_CD =   F.WH_CD
                   AND LEFT(A.ADV_DT,6)    =   F.BASE_YYYYMM
                   AND <http://F.ORG|F.ORG>_PART = '1'
                   INNER JOIN  BBA010T D
                   ON  A.ITEM_CD   =   D.ITEM_CD
                   INNER JOIN  MBA210T H
                   ON  A.REL_NO    =   H.PO_PLAN_NO
                   AND A.REL_SEQ   =   H.PO_PLAN_SEQ
            WHERE   A.STS <> 'R'
              AND  A.ADV_KIND    =         'W'
              AND  A.ADV_DT >=       '20260310'
              AND  A.ADV_DT <=       '20260410'
              GROUP BY A.ADV_KIND
       ) YY
